name: Salsa Pasta Ole'
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Bottled hot or medium salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring water to a boil and salt it. Add Farfalle pasta and cook according to package directions until al dente.
2. In a medium skillet, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Fry scallions in batches for about 2 minutes each batch until crisp and beginning to brown. Drain on paper towels.
3. Drain the cooked pasta and return it to the saucepan. Add salsa and shredded Jack cheese; toss to coat evenly. Serve with the fried scallions.
